## ♿ Accessibility Check
<!-- Please check all that apply -->
- [ ] Semantic HTML used
- [ ] Keyboard navigation supported (tab order, focus states)
- [ ] ARIA labels added for icon-only components
- [ ] Sufficient color contrast verified
- [ ] Focus indicators are clearly visible

- [ ] Smooth transitions/animations included
- [ ] Helpful empty states or feedback provided
